int format_metric_point(char* metric_name, char** label_keys, char** label_values, int label_count, char* metric_output) {
    // Check for invalid inputs
    if (metric_name == NULL || metric_output == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count > 0 && (label_keys == NULL || label_values == NULL)) {
        return -1;
    }

    char *p = metric_output;
    int ret;

    // Write the metric name
    ret = sprintf(p, "%s", metric_name);
    if (ret < 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    p += ret;

    // If there are labels, format them
    if (label_count > 0) {
        // Opening brace
        ret = sprintf(p, "{");
        if (ret < 0) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += ret;

        // Format each label
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            ret = sprintf(p, "%s=\"%s\"", label_keys[i], label_values[i]);
            if (ret < 0) {
                return -1;
            }
            p += ret;

            // Add comma if not the last label
            if (i < label_count - 1) {
                ret = sprintf(p, ",");
                if (ret < 0) {
                    return -1;
                }
                p += ret;
            }
        }

        // Closing brace
        ret = sprintf(p, "}");
        if (ret < 0) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += ret;
    }

    return (int)(p - metric_output);
}

#include "monitoring_system.h"

int format_metric_point(char* metric_name, char** label_keys, char** label_values, int label_count, char* metric_output) {
    if (metric_name == NULL || metric_output == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }
    
    if (label_count > 0) {
        if (label_keys == NULL || label_values == NULL) {
            return -1;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            if (label_keys[i] == NULL || label_values[i] == NULL) {
                return -1;
            }
        }
    }
    
    int total_len = strlen(metric_name);
    
    if (label_count > 0) {
        total_len += 2; // for the two braces
        
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            total_len += strlen(label_keys[i]);
            total_len += 3; // for '=', '"', and '"'
            total_len += strlen(label_values[i]);
            if (i < label_count - 1) {
                total_len += 1; // comma
            }
        }
    }
    
    int written = 0;
    int n;
    
    n = snprintf(metric_output, total_len + 1, "%s", metric_name);
    if (n < 0) return -1;
    written = n;
    
    if (label_count > 0) {
        n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, "{");
        if (n < 0) return -1;
        written += n;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, "%s", label_keys[i]);
            if (n < 0) return -1;
            written += n;
            
            n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, "=\"");
            if (n < 0) return -1;
            written += n;
            
            n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, "%s\"", label_values[i]);
            if (n < 0) return -1;
            written += n;
            
            if (i < label_count - 1) {
                n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, ",");
                if (n < 0) return -1;
                written += n;
            }
        }
        
        n = snprintf(metric_output + written, total_len + 1 - written, "}");
        if (n < 0) return -1;
        written += n;
    }
    
    return written;
}
```

#include "monitoring_system.h"
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <limits.h>

int format_metric_point(char* metric_name, char** label_keys, char** label_values, int label_count, char* metric_output) {
    // Input validation
    if (metric_name == NULL || metric_output == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count < 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count > 0 && (label_keys == NULL || label_values == NULL)) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Calculate total length required without null terminator using size_t
    size_t total_len = 0;
    size_t metric_len = strlen(metric_name);
    if (metric_len > (size_t)INT_MAX - 2) {
        return -1;
    }
    total_len = metric_len + 2; // braces

    // Handle labels
    if (label_count > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            // Validate each label key and value
            if (label_keys[i] == NULL || label_values[i] == NULL) {
                return -1;
            }
            size_t key_len = strlen(label_keys[i]);
            size_t value_len = strlen(label_values[i]);

            // Add comma for non-first labels
            if (i > 0) {
                if (total_len > (size_t)INT_MAX - 1) {
                    return -1;
                }
                total_len += 1;
            }

            // Calculate length for label key, value, and fixed characters
            size_t label_part_len = key_len + value_len + 3; // =""
            if (label_part_len > (size_t)INT_MAX) {
                return -1;
            }
            if (total_len > (size_t)INT_MAX - label_part_len) {
                return -1;
            }
            total_len += label_part_len;
        }
    }

    // Ensure total_len does not exceed INT_MAX for return value
    if (total_len > (size_t)INT_MAX) {
        return -1;
    }
    int total_len_int = (int)total_len;

    // Build the output string
    int offset = 0;
    int remaining = total_len_int + 1; // +1 for null terminator

    // Write metric name
    int ret = snprintf(metric_output, remaining, "%s", metric_name);
    if (ret < 0 || ret >= remaining) return -1;
    offset += ret;
    remaining -= ret;

    // Write opening brace
    ret = snprintf(metric_output + offset, remaining, "{");
    if (ret < 0 || ret >= remaining) return -1;
    offset += ret;
    remaining -= ret;

    // Write labels
    for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
        if (i > 0) {
            ret = snprintf(metric_output + offset, remaining, ",");
            if (ret < 0 || ret >= remaining) return -1;
            offset += ret;
            remaining -= ret;
        }
        ret = snprintf(metric_output + offset, remaining, "%s=\"%s\"", label_keys[i], label_values[i]);
        if (ret < 0 || ret >= remaining) return -1;
        offset += ret;
        remaining -= ret;
    }

    // Write closing brace
    ret = snprintf(metric_output + offset, remaining, "}");
    if (ret < 0 || ret >= remaining) return -1;
    offset += ret;

    return offset; // Length of formatted string
}

    if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
        return -1;
    }
    p += n;
    remaining -= n;

    // Write '{'
    n = snprintf(p, remaining, "{");
    if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
        return -1;
    }
    p += n;
    remaining -= n;

    // Write labels
    for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
        // Write key
        n = snprintf(p, remaining, "%s", label_keys[i]);
        if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += n;
        remaining -= n;

        // Write '="'
        n = snprintf(p, remaining, "=\"");
        if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += n;
        remaining -= n;

        // Write value
        n = snprintf(p, remaining, "%s", label_values[i]);
        if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += n;
        remaining -= n;

        // Write '"'
        n = snprintf(p, remaining, "\"");
        if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
            return -1;
        }
        p += n;
        remaining -= n;

        // If not the last label, write ", "
        if (i < label_count - 1) {
            n = snprintf(p, remaining, ", ");
            if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
                return -1;
            }
            p += n;
            remaining -= n;
        }
    }

    // Write '}'
    n = snprintf(p, remaining, "}");
    if (n < 0 || n >= remaining) {
        return -1;
    }
    p += n;
    remaining -= n;

    return total_length;
}

```c
#include "monitoring_system.h"
#include <string.h>

int format_metric_point(char* metric_name, char** label_keys, char** label_values, int label_count, char* metric_output) {
    // Validate input parameters
    if (metric_name == NULL || metric_output == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count < 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count > 0 && (label_keys == NULL || label_values == NULL)) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Calculate total length required
    size_t total_length = strlen(metric_name);
    if (label_count > 0) {
        total_length += 2; // for '{' and '}'
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            total_length += strlen(label_keys[i]) + strlen(label_values[i]) + 3; // for key="value" (includes quotes and equals)
        }
        total_length += (label_count - 1); // commas between labels
    }

    // Define maximum buffer size
    const size_t MAX_BUFFER = 4096;
    if (total_length >= MAX_BUFFER) {
        return -1; // String too long
    }

    // Use stack buffer for safe formatting
    char buffer[MAX_BUFFER];
    int offset = 0;
    int len;

    // Write metric name
    len = snprintf(buffer + offset, MAX_BUFFER - offset, "%s", metric_name);
    if (len < 0 || offset + len >= MAX_BUFFER) return -1;
    offset += len;

    // Handle labels if present
    if (label_count > 0) {
        // Write opening brace
        len = snprintf(buffer + offset, MAX_BUFFER - offset, "{");
        if (len < 0 || offset + len >= MAX_BUFFER) return -1;
        offset += len;

        // Write each label key-value pair
        for (int i = 0; i < label_count; i++) {
            // Add comma before each label except the first
            if (i > 0) {
                len = snprintf(buffer + offset, MAX_BUFFER - offset, ",");
                if (len < 0 || offset + len >= MAX_BUFFER) return -1;
                offset += len;
            }

            // Format: key="value"
            len = snprintf(buffer + offset, MAX_BUFFER - offset, "%s=\"%s\"", label_keys[i], label_values[i]);
            if (len < 0 || offset + len >= MAX_BUFFER) return -1;
            offset += len;
        }

        // Write closing brace
        len = snprintf(buffer + offset, MAX_BUFFER - offset, "}");
        if (len < 0 || offset + len >= MAX_BUFFER) return -1;
        offset += len;
    }

    // Copy formatted string to output buffer
    strcpy(metric_output, buffer);
    return offset;
}

int format_metric_point(char* metric_name, char** label_keys, char** label_values, int label_count, char* metric_output) {

        return -1;
    }
    if (label_count > 0) {
        if (label_keys == NULL || label_values == NULL) {
            return -1;

    *p = '\0';
    return length;
}
